parameters.name: vdd
parameters.override_behavior: preserves the public compatibility supply-domain parameter

parameters.name: DITHER_AMP
parameters.override_behavior: sets the magnitude of the injected differential dither

modeling_constraints: Use deterministic voltage-domain differential dither injection.
Preserve common mode and smooth polarity-updated dither targets.
Do not use transistor-level devices, AC/noise analysis, waveform artifacts, or simulator side channels.
problem_statement: the supplied system violates the public contract

properties.observable_contract: When DPN is above vth, the output differential exceeds the input differential by DITHER_AMP.
When DPN is at or below vth, the output differential is lower than the input differential by DITHER_AMP.
Half of the selected differential dither is added to VOUT_P and half is subtracted from VOUT_N.
The output pair preserves the input common mode and does not introduce a vdd/2 offset.
Legal DITHER_AMP and vth overrides change only dither magnitude and polarity decision as declared.

title: Dither Adder
